description: Ski binding hole templates. All coordinates in mm relative to mounting point. X+ toward tip, Y+ lateral right.

bindings.name: Marker Kingpin
bindings.notes: Tech binding. Toe line may not be exactly 15mm from pin line.

bindings.name: Salomon Alpine Bindings
bindings.notes: Covers Salomon alpine until 2013, Scott and Atomic rebadges.

bindings.name: Salomon Warden 11
bindings.notes: NOT YET VERIFIED - USE WITH CAUTION.

bindings.name: Salomon Rental (SC)
bindings.notes: Fixed rental binding, BSL 310-340. No BSL adjustment.

bindings.name: Tyrolia / Head AAAttack13 Demo/Rental
bindings.notes: Fixed position rental binding. No BSL adjustment.

bindings.name: Marker Duke / Baron / Tour F10/F12
bindings.notes: Reference is boot tip not mounting point. S=265-320, L=300-360.

bindings.name: Marker Duke EPF
bindings.notes: Wider hole spacing than Duke/Baron. Boot tip reference.

bindings.name: Rossignol Axial Racing / Look PX Racing
Fritschi Diamir Freeride / Freeride Plus
bindings.notes: Freeride Plus has additional central hole.

bindings.name: Fritschi Diamir FreeridePro + Eagle (2010)
bindings.notes: FreeridePro has additional central hole. S/M/L size variants.

bindings.name: Fritschi Diamir Vipec
bindings.notes: Tech binding with wide toe horn.

bindings.name: Salomon MTN
bindings.notes: NOT YET VERIFIED - USE WITH CAUTION. Tech binding.

bindings.name: Salomon Shift MNC 13
bindings.notes: NOT YET VERIFIED - USE WITH CAUTION. Hybrid alpine/tech.
